      • checkPortOpen

        public static boolean checkPortOpen(java.lang.String hostAndPort,
                                    int millis)
        Checks if a port is open on a specified host.
        Parameters:
        hostAndPort - A string representing the host and port in the format "host:port"
        millis - The timeout value in milliseconds

      • checkPortOpen

        public static boolean checkPortOpen(java.lang.String host,
                                    int port,
                                    int timeoutMillis)
        Checks if a port is open on a specified host.

      • findFreePort

        public static int findFreePort(int from,
                               int to)
        Finds a free port within the specified range.

      • sendHttpRequest

        public static JkUtilsNet.BasicHttpResponse sendHttpRequest(java.lang.String url,
                                                           java.lang.String method,
                                                           java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.String> headers,
                                                           java.lang.String requestBody)
        Sends an HTTP request to the specified URL using the specified method and parameters.
        Parameters:
        url - The URL to send the request to
        method - The HTTP method to use (e.g., "GET", "POST", etc.)
        requestBody - The parameters to include in the request body
        Returns:
        The response from the server as a BasicHttpResponse object
        Throws:
        java.io.UncheckedIOException - If an I/O error occurs while sending the request or receiving the response

      • sendHttpRequest

        public static JkUtilsNet.BasicHttpResponse sendHttpRequest(java.lang.String url,
                                                           java.lang.String method,
                                                           java.lang.String requestBody)

      • downloadFile

        public static void downloadFile(java.lang.String fileURL,
                                java.nio.file.Path saveFilePath)

      • downloadFile

        public static void downloadFile(java.net.URL url,
                                java.nio.file.Path saveFilePath,
                                java.util.function.Consumer<java.net.HttpURLConnection> urlConnectionCustomizer)
        Downloads the specified url file at the specified file.
        Parameters:
        url - the url file to download
        saveFilePath - The filesystem location to get the file once downloaded
